# Issue #2: Database schema implementation with SQLAlchemy

## Description
Implement the complete database schema using SQLAlchemy ORM models.

## Tasks
- [x] Create User model
- [x] Create ProductModel and BOMItem models
- [x] Create Inventory model
- [x] Create ManufacturingOrder model
- [x] Create Supplier, SupplierProduct, and PurchaseOrder models
- [x] Create EventLog model
- [x] Setup database connection and session management
- [x] Add database initialization function

## Acceptance Criteria
- All tables created correctly
- Relationships properly defined
- Database can be initialized without errors

## Phase
Phase 1 - Foundation
